series_metadata.series_description: Records contain maintenance service performances on all BWC equipment such as service histories, work orders, service order receipts, printers, fax machines, copier time/date stamp.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Scan into Office Services SharePoint site. Destroy once electronic records are validated. ; Electronic: Retain electronic service records of the maintenance performed on the equipment for the lifetime of the equipment, and then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
